name: Communications of the ACM

length.basis: acmsmall template, single-column single-spaced, incl tables/graphics/figures; references excluded from page count but capped in number
length.inclusions: figures and tables count; references excluded but limited
length.note: Section-specific: Opinion <=5p/<=10 refs; Research & Advances <=10p/<=40 refs; Research Highlights <=8p/<=25 refs; News <=2000 words.

abstract.note: Required as a submission field; no cap stated.

extra_front_matter.name: Statement of interest
extra_front_matter.note: Why the material interests the computing field / is valuable to a CACM reader.

citation_style: Numbered references, ordered alphabetically by last name; every listed reference cited in text by its number.

formatting.note: Single-spaced single-column; font/margins governed by the acmsmall template.

figures_tables.note: Counted in the page limit; concise captions required; code >35 chars wide reset as a captioned figure.

contents: Statement explaining why the material interests the computing field.
cover_letter.note: Not a formal cover letter; a statement of interest is required.

ai_disclosure.note: Governed by ACM's Policy on Authorship (covers generative-AI use); referenced, not restated on the CACM page.

distinctive_rules: Section-specific limits; some sections are by invitation only.
Simultaneous submissions declined outright and not reconsidered.
